creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
fix plist, reported by pointyhat.

Fix: here is a patch:


If this port can be replaced by audio/xmms, I feel good to remove this port again...--0e7SfZ2d6dConpYu8aoybFIxRGu98OrR4nVWWU9WoCTdrcTn
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- pkg-plist.orig	2011-10-01 16:59:02.000000000 +0900
+++ pkg-plist	2011-11-26 07:56:06.000000000 +0900
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@
 lib/x11amp/Output/libesdout.la
 lib/x11amp/Output/libesdout.so
 %%DATADIR%%/wmx11amp.xpm
-@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/x11amp
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
 @dirrm lib/x11amp/Output
 @dirrm lib/x11amp/Input
 @dirrm lib/x11amp/General
